name: anban
description: Anban Creator plugin for WeChat, Seednote, Montage, ecommerce, and agent-assisted publishing workflows

api_key.title: Anban API Key
api_key.description: API Key from https://creator.anbanai.com/settings used to authenticate the Anban Creator MCP server.

api_url.title: Anban API URL
api_url.description: Base URL for the Anban Creator API. Use the default for the official hosted service.
